input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: COU boundary condition differs in kind from every training case.

case_context.cou: surrogate predicts a temperature field under a convective BC
case_context.decision_consequence: thermal decision under the new BC

input.raw_artifact: Validation report — heat-transfer surrogate. Validated across 200 operating cases with low error. Every training and validation case imposes a fixed-temperature (Dirichlet) wall condition. The surrogate is proposed for a case with a convective (Robin) wall condition; no training or validation case used a convective wall.

answer_key.gold_mechanism: Every training case uses a Dirichlet wall; the COU is a Robin (convective) BC — a structurally different boundary condition the surrogate never trained on, so the 200-case validation does not cover it.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

forbidden_claims: asserts the temperature field is wrong (a verdict the BC mismatch does not establish)
treats the 200 Dirichlet cases as coverage for the Robin BC

hardness.obvious_signal: the surrogate is validated across a wide range of operating points (200 cases)
hardness.conflicting_signal: all 200 training/validation cases use a fixed-temperature (Dirichlet) wall, but the COU is a convective (Robin) boundary condition — a different kind of BC the surrogate never saw, not a new point within the trained family

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 applicability: the validated domain is the trained BC family; a structurally different boundary condition is outside it regardless of case count.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
